{{Infobox character
| name = Gharyas
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Gharyas]] is the [[Perfected Shadow]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c5">''The Knight'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Gharyas]]'s hallmarks are material sabotage and inciting fanaticism.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Gharyas]] is conducting an operation.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c29">''The Knight'', chapter 29</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|"Your opponent is Gharyas, the Perfected Shadow."<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c5" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|"His hallmarks are material sabotage and inciting fanaticism."<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
